localized_footers.brazilian: ou um item especial e excessivamente raro!
localized_footers.dutch: of een extreem zeldzaam speciaal voorwerp!
localized_footers.english: or an Exceedingly Rare Special Item!
localized_footers.french: ou un item spécial extrêmement rare !
localized_footers.hungarian: vagy egy rendkívül ritka különleges tárgy!
localized_footers.indonesian: atau Item Spesial yang Sangat Langka!
localized_footers.italian: o un oggetto speciale eccezionalmente raro!
localized_footers.japanese: あるいは、非常にレアなスペシャルアイテムが入っている可能性も！
localized_footers.portuguese: ou um item especial extremamente raro!
localized_footers.romanian: sau un obiect extrem de rar și special!

localized_footers.schinese_pw: or an Exceedingly Rare Special Item!
localized_footers.tchinese: 或極度稀有的特殊物品！
localized_footers.thai: หรือไอเท็มพิเศษหายากมาก!
localized_footers.turkish: ya da Son Derece Nadir Özel Bir Eşya!
